mlb.summary: — Robbie Ray held the Athletics to an unearned run and two hits in eight innings to lead the San Francisco Giants to a 3-1 victory Tuesday night.

mlb.headline: Athletics vs. San Francisco Giants: Game Highlights
mlb.summary: Athletics vs. San Francisco Giants: Game Highlights

mlb.headline: Ryan Johnson dominates, Nolan Schanuel adds 2-run HR as Angels beat Orioles 5-1
mlb.summary: — Rookie right-hander Ryan Johnson gave up one hit over six scoreless innings, Nolan Schanuel hit an early two-run home run and the Los Angeles Angels beat the Baltimore Orioles 5-1 on Tuesday night.

mlb.headline: Zack Gelof's hand injured by spikes, ending 24-game hit streak
mlb.summary: Athletics infielder Zack Gelof left Tuesday night's game in the second inning with a gruesome injury after the Giants' Matt Chapman stepped on Gelof's right hand during an awkward tag play at second base.

nhl.headline: Blackhawks acquire Bowen Byram in trade with Sabres
nhl.summary: The Blackhawks acquired defenseman Bowen Byram and forward Jordan Greenway in a trade with the Sabres on Tuesday, in exchange for the Nos. 4 and 45 picks in Friday's NHL draft, along with defenseman Louis Crevier.

nhl.headline: NHL trade grades: Report cards for biggest deals of 2026 offseason
nhl.summary: The summer trade season is officially on fire! Find grades for each GM involved in all the big swaps here.

nhl.headline: Caps add Kyrou, send McMichael, Gastrin, No. 16 pick to Blues
nhl.summary: The Capitals acquired veteran winger Jordan Kyrou from the Blues in exchange for Connor McMichael, Milton Gastrin and the No. 16 pick in Friday's NHL draft.

nhl.headline: NHL commish: 'Level of decorum' expected for Mike Babcock
nhl.summary: NHL commissioner Gary Bettman said that although there was no basis for keeping the Oilers from hiring Mike Babcock, the veteran coach is expected to uphold a "certain level of decorum."

nhl.headline: Senators acquire William Eklund from Sharks for No. 9 pick
nhl.summary: The Senators acquired left winger William Eklund, prospect Kasper Halttunen and the rights to prospect Brandon Svoboda from the Sharks for the No. 9 pick in this week's NHL Draft.

nhl.headline: Canadian Olympian Emma Maltais joins PWHL champion Victoire
nhl.summary: The Walter Cup champion Montreal Victoire have signed Emma Maltais to a two-year contract on Tuesday in adding another Canadian Olympian to their lineup.

nba.headline: Lopez becomes NBA's 1st Mexico-born 1st-rounder, traded to Grizzlies
nba.summary: Karim Lopez became the first player born in Mexico to be selected in the first round of the NBA draft, being selected with the No. 21 pick to the Detroit Pistons before being traded to the Memphis Grizzlies on Tuesday night.

wnba.headline: Liberty beat Aces 87-76 behind Breanna Stewart and Sabrina Ionescu
wnba.summary: — Breanna Stewart scored 15 of her 20 points in the second half and Sabrina Ionescu had a double-double with 16 points and 10 rebounds to lead the New York Liberty to an 87-76 victory over the Las Vegas Aces on Tuesday night.

wnba.headline: Hammon: Brunson opinion wrong, but won't apologize for take
wnba.summary: Aces coach Becky Hammon had a change of heart regarding her prior criticism of Knicks star Jalen Brunson, saying Tuesday night that her "opinion was wrong." But she's not apologizing for having it.

wnba.headline: Caitlin Clark scores 24, Kelsey Mitchell adds 22 and the Fever beat the Mercury 86-77
wnba.summary: — Caitlin Clark had 24 points and nine assists, Kelsey Mitchell scored 22 points, and the Indiana Fever overcame a 13-point, first-quarter deficit to beat the Phoenix Mercury 86-77 on Monday night.

ncaab.headline: 2026 MCWS finals: Sneaky Sooners claim another national title
ncaab.summary: After winning a third MCWS, Oklahoma might just be one of greatest under-the-radar college baseball programs.

ncaab.headline: Jaxon Willits on how he stayed confident at plate, his love for Oklahoma
ncaab.summary: Willits reflects on how he was able to find success at the plate and help the Sooners' claim a National Championship, ensuring that this is the only the beginning of OU's dynasty.

ncaab.headline: Jason Walk explains when OU's mentality changed, reflects on MCWS title
ncaab.summary: Walk tells SEC Now about the moment when Oklahoma's season changed, crediting a mid-season loss for inspiring them as he celebrates a MCWS title.

ncaab.headline: Brendan Brock reflects on how much it means to bring OU a championship
ncaab.summary: After growing up a lifelong Sooners fan, Brock expresses how blessed he feels to bring his childhood team a MCWS title while touching on how he stayed hot at the plate.

ncaab.headline: Which underrated star stood out the most in OU's MCWS Championship?
ncaab.summary: SEC Now's David Dellucci and Todd Walker rave about LJ Mercurius stepping up big time and outperforming the Tar Heels' pitching staff to play a big part in Oklahoma's third MCWS title.

ncaab.headline: Highlight: Oklahoma routs UNC in series finale to claim third NCAA Championship
ncaab.summary: The Sooners complete their magical run, besting the Tar Heels, 13-2, behind six RBIs from Kyle Branch and a homer from Dayton Tockey as the SEC claims it's seventh straight MCWS title.

tennis.headline: Get hyped for Wimbledon, starting June 29 on ESPN

tennis.headline: Jack Draper wins in latest injury comeback with coach Andy Murray watching
tennis.summary: Jack Draper made an encouraging start to his latest injury comeback by beating lucky loser Marcos Giron in straight sets in the first round of the Lexus Eastbourne Open.

tennis.headline: Francisco Cerundolo beats Tommy Paul to win Queen's title
tennis.summary: Francisco Cerundolo of Argentina beat former champion Tommy Paul to win the Queen's final 6-7 (4), 6-4, 6-3.

tennis.headline: Frances Tiafoe beats Taylor Fritz to win all-American Halle final
tennis.summary: Frances Tiafoe beat fifth-seeded Taylor Fritz 6-4, 6-4 in an all-American final in Halle.

tennis.headline: Musetti withdraws from Wimbledon, opens space for Berrettini
tennis.summary: Lorenzo Musetti has pulled out of Wimbledon as he recovers from a left thigh injury.

tennis.headline: Venus, Serena Williams pairing among Wimbledon wild cards
tennis.summary: Venus and Serena Williams will play doubles at Wimbledon, teaming up for the first time since the 2022 US Open, where they lost their opening match.

f1.headline: Austrian Grand Prix 2026: Race start time, how to watch, full schedule, predictions
f1.summary: Formula 1 continues its run in Europe and heads to Austria to the Red Bull Ring for the eighth race of the season.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton, Fred Vasseur and Ferrari's long-overdue evolution: What's the secret behind F1 turnaround?
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton is back, but what's clicked this season? ESPN Nate Saunders analyses how Hamilton has helped change Ferrari.

f1.headline: Mercedes opt not to pursue appeal into George Russell's Monaco GP penalties
f1.summary: Mercedes has withdrawn its attempt to challenge George Russell's costly Monaco Grand Prix penalties, saying Formula 1 and the FIA have shown sufficient determination to address the bizarre circumstances that led to the controversy.

f1.headline: Lewis Hamilton 'relentless' with changes at Ferrari, Fred Vasseur 'enabled them to happen'
f1.summary: Lewis Hamilton has said Ferrari's first victory of the season would not have happened without a series of changes he pushed for behind the scenes, crediting team boss Fred Vasseur for backing his demands.

f1.headline: Red Bull join McLaren in appealing Pierre Gasly's reinstated podium - sources
f1.summary: McLaren has lodged a notification to appeal with the FIA's International Court of Appeal over the decision to rescind Pierre Gasly's speeding penalties at the Monaco Grand Prix and reinstate the Alpine driver on the podium.

f1.headline: F1 on track to hit net zero target after 35% reduction in carbon footprint
f1.summary: Formula 1 says it remains on track to achieve its target of becoming net zero by 2030 after reporting a 35% reduction in its carbon footprint compared to 2018.

football.headline: Taylor Swift attends Tight End University with Travis Kelce
football.summary: While eyes were on the couple amid their upcoming wedding, the singer/songwriter attended the exclusive event for tight ends.

football.headline: Wetzel: NFL's denial of Brendan Sorsby sends the right message
football.summary: The NFL sent a powerful reminder to Sorsby and others: Sports wagering can bring significant repercussions.

football.headline: Bills great Jim Kelly says he recently had stroke but feels 'good'
football.summary: Jim Kelly said he suffered a stroke this spring and subsequently spent a few days in the hospital, but added that he currently feels "really good."

football.headline: Bills give a look inside new Highmark Stadium at ribbon-cutting ceremony
football.summary: Buffalo's new home features a natural grass field, the world's largest stadium snow-melt system and wind-reducing technology.
